description.zh-Hans: 为带有Alpha遮罩的图像添加投影、内阴影或发光效果。
description.en: Adds drop shadow, inner shadow, or glow effects to alpha-matted images.

triggers.zh-Hans: 投影, 内阴影, 发光, 阴影效果, 下落阴影
triggers.en: drop shadow, inner shadow, glow, shadow effect

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为精灵添加投影以增强深度感。
exampleUsage.en: Add a drop shadow to a sprite to enhance depth perception.
